messages.content: design me a 3 stage Pokémon that is a pigeon with moves and stats and information and pokedex

Pokémon Name: Pidon

Stage 1: Pidove

Type: Normal/Flying

Pokedex Entry: Pidove, the Tiny Pigeon Pokémon. This small bird Pokémon is often seen fluttering around urban areas. Its tiny wings allow it to fly short distances. Pidove communicates with its companions through gentle cooing sounds.

Stats:
- HP: 40
- Attack: 55
- Defense: 40
- Special Attack: 35
- Special Defense: 35
- Speed: 60

Moves:
- Tackle (Normal)
- Growl (Normal)
- Quick Attack (Normal)
- Air Cutter (Flying)

Stage 2: Tranquill

Type: Normal/Flying

Pokedex Entry: Tranquill, the Wild Pigeon Pokémon. Known for its calm and serene nature, Tranquill often perches motionless on tree branches, keeping an eye on everything happening around it. Its wings allow it to glide effortlessly through the sky.

Stats:
- HP: 60
- Attack: 77
- Defense: 62
- Special Attack: 50
- Special Defense: 50
- Speed: 87

Moves:
- Quick Attack (Normal)
- Air Cutter (Flying)
- Roost (Flying)
- Detect (Fighting)

Stage 3: Pidgeot

Type: Normal/Flying

Pokedex Entry: Pidgeot, the Majestic Pigeon Pokémon. This Pokémon is known for its brilliant speed and keen vision. Pidgeot can easily spot prey from high altitudes and dive down at incredible speeds to strike with its sharp beak and talons.

Stats:
- HP: 83
- Attack: 95
- Defense: 80
- Special Attack: 70
- Special Defense: 70
- Speed: 101

Moves:
- Quick Attack (Normal)
- Air Slash (Flying)
- Tailwind (Flying)
- Hurricane (Flying)

Note: These moves and stats are based on existing Pokémon moves and stats. Feel free to modify them or add additional moves to customize your Pokémon.

Pokémon Name: Odoroost

Type: Poison/Flying

Pokedex Entry: Odoroost, the Stench Rooster Pokémon. Odoroost is a unique and pungent rooster that emits a noxious odor from its feathers. Its scent can be overpowering, causing discomfort and repelling foes. It is known for its mischievous and prankster nature.

Stats:
- HP: 70
- Attack: 85
- Defense: 60
- Special Attack: 55
- Special Defense: 60
- Speed: 80

Moves:
- Peck (Flying)
- Poison Gas (Poison)
- Wing Attack (Flying)
- Smokescreen (Normal)

Evolves from: Foulchick (Level up with high friendship)

Pokedex Entry: Foulchick, the Foul Chick Pokémon. Foulchick is a small and scrappy chick known for its affinity for mischief. It has already begun developing its pungent scent, which it uses to defend itself and play pranks on unsuspecting foes.

Stats:
- HP: 40
- Attack: 55
- Defense: 35
- Special Attack: 30
- Special Defense: 35
- Speed: 50

Moves:
- Peck (Flying)
- Growl (Normal)
- Sweet Scent (Grass)
- Poison Gas (Poison) 

Note: These moves and stats are based on existing Pokémon moves and stats. You can customize them or create new moves to make your own unique version of Odoroost.
